caption: The video begins with a static shot of the Manipal Hospitals logo, prominently displayed against a plain white background. The logo features the text "manipalhospitals" in a clean, modern font, with "manipal" in blue and "hospitals" in green. Below the main text, the tagline "LIFE'S ON" is written in smaller blue letters, accompanied by a small red cross symbol. This initial frame remains unchanged for a few seconds, allowing viewers to fully absorb the branding and message of the hospital. The simplicity and clarity of the design suggest a professional and trustworthy healthcare provider, setting a tone of reliability and care. As the video progresses, there is no immediate change in the visual content, maintaining the focus on the logo and its associated message.
